note: Created tests/ffi_test_harness.rs with: valid_wg_conf() config helper; safe wrappers for all 7 extern C functions (wg_device_new, wg_device_free, wg_connect, wg_close, wg_send, wg_recv, wg_last_error); null pointer and zero-length slice helpers; spawn_concurrent and spawn_concurrent_with_barrier thread helpers; re-exported error constants; 6 smoke tests all passing.
